work.name: Canada West Land
work.summary: GIS technologist focused on enterprise GIS data management, ETL automation, map production, and AI-assisted pipeline development.
highlights: Serve as a key contributor on a large-scale enterprise GIS project for a major client, owning a workstream of six production maps and the supporting data visualization workflows across feature, land, and reference datasets ranging from roughly 5,000 to 1M records.
Built end-to-end ETL and data-cleaning pipelines with Esri, FME, Python scripting, APIs, and HTML/CSS expression styling for polished professional map outputs.

Contributed to an internal Azure-hosted production app for agentic AI workflows using LangChain, LangGraph, and n8n, with role-specific system-prompt design; reduced selected full-day manual processes to 1 to 2 hours.

Developed and shipped within an Azure DevOps environment, using Azure Repos for source control and code review, Azure Pipelines for automated build and release (CI/CD), and Doppler for secrets management across a branch-based collaboration workflow.

work.name: University of Calgary
work.summary: Led capstone delivery for a geospatial mapping study, comparing survey methods and validating spatial datasets with photogrammetry tools and Python-based analysis.

work.name: Gongcha
work.summary: Managed high-volume shift operations and trained staff on standardized workflows, strengthening team coordination and execution under time constraints.

courses: Software-relevant foundation in spatial databases, data analysis, Python workflows, and technical reporting

projects.name: Glass Atlas: Source-Grounded RAG Knowledge Site
projects.description: Deployed SvelteKit 2 (Svelte 5 runes) editorial site that turns a personal note library into a conversational, citation-backed assistant.
highlights: Engineered hybrid semantic + lexical retrieval over Neon PostgreSQL with pgvector (cosine similarity) and Drizzle ORM, with confidence-tiered fallbacks that keep every answer grounded in source notes.
Built streaming RAG chat through OpenRouter (Gemini 2.0 Flash) on text-embedding-3-small 1536-dim vectors, with strict-TypeScript end-to-end typing.
Shipped on Railway with a Bun HTTP server, Auth.js GitHub OAuth, and private S3-compatible storage via presigned URLs.

projects.name: Weather & Wellness: UBC Research Platform
projects.description: Production multi-tenant research platform for a UBC Psychology lab where research assistants run validated psychological instruments with anonymous participants.
highlights: Built a Next.js 15 / React 19 frontend and FastAPI backend that auto-scores validated instruments (digit span, loneliness, depression, anxiety) in real time.
Architected per-lab data isolation on Supabase Postgres/Auth with Upstash Redis, shipped to production at ubcpsych.com.

projects.name: PigeonCoop: Local-First Agent Workflow IDE
projects.description: Active-development Rust/Tauri desktop app for designing, running, monitoring, and replaying agent workflows against local repositories.
highlights: Built a React/TypeScript graph workspace with Start, End, Agent, Tool, Router, Memory, and Human Review nodes, plus pre-run validation and workspace-scoped CLI execution for repository tasks.
Designed Rust core crates for typed workflow definitions, RunEvent envelopes, deterministic run/node state machines, runtime adapters, and SQLite-backed workflow/run/event persistence.
Added replay/debugging and human-review surfaces backed by Rust unit tests, React component tests, and WebdriverIO/Tauri E2E coverage across builder, live run, review, and replay flows.
